title: Industrial Safety
learning_objectives: Understand the importance of industrial safety.
Learn the responsibilities of employees and employers in maintaining a safe workplace.
Understand basic safety rules followed in manufacturing industries.

introduction.title: What is Industrial Safety?
introduction.content: Industrial Safety refers to the policies, procedures and practices implemented to protect employees, equipment, property and the environment from accidents, injuries and occupational hazards. A safe workplace not only prevents incidents but also improves productivity, morale and operational efficiency.

business_purpose.title: Why is Industrial Safety Important?
business_purpose.content: Industrial safety helps organizations reduce workplace accidents, protect employees, minimize equipment damage and comply with legal regulations. In manufacturing industries like JSL, safety is a shared responsibility that supports uninterrupted production and sustainable business operations.

safety_objectives: Promote a culture of safety awareness.

common_workplace_hazards.description: Moving machinery, rotating equipment and conveyors can cause serious injuries.
Faulty wiring, exposed cables and energized equipment may lead to electric shock.
Exposure to hazardous chemicals can cause burns, poisoning or respiratory issues.
Improper storage of flammable materials increases fire risk.
Long-term exposure to high noise levels may damage hearing.
Poor posture and repetitive work can lead to musculoskeletal disorders.

employee_responsibilities: Use equipment only after proper authorization.

safety_signs.purpose: Indicate actions that must be followed, such as wearing PPE.
Indicate actions that are not allowed.
Identify exits, first aid stations and emergency equipment.

daily_safety_workflow: Attend toolbox talk or safety briefing.
Perform assigned work according to SOPs.
Maintain housekeeping during and after work.

integration.purpose: Ensures manufacturing activities are performed safely.
Supports safe repair and maintenance of equipment.
Safety interlocks and automated monitoring improve operational safety.
Coordinates safety training and awareness programs.

business_example.title: Industrial Safety at JSL
business_example.content: Before entering a production area, employees wear mandatory PPE, attend safety briefings and inspect their work area. Machine guards, emergency stop buttons and warning signs help reduce operational risks. Any unsafe condition is immediately reported to supervisors to prevent accidents.

important_notes: All accidents are preventable with proper planning and awareness.
Near-miss incidents should always be reported.
A strong safety culture improves productivity and employee well-being.
